human_cases.title: High-Severity Respiratory Case - Nairobi
human_cases.description: A 45-year-old male with severe respiratory symptoms presenting with fever and shortness of breath

human_cases.title: Foodborne Illness Case - Kampala
human_cases.description: A 28-year-old female with acute gastrointestinal symptoms suggesting potential food poisoning

human_cases.title: Mild Respiratory Case - Addis Ababa
human_cases.description: A 25-year-old male with mild respiratory symptoms, likely viral upper respiratory infection

human_cases.title: Moderate Respiratory Case - Nairobi (Cluster 2)
human_cases.description: A 32-year-old female with moderate respiratory symptoms from same area as case 001
human_cases.note: Triggers escalation due to proximity to HUMAN_001

animal_events.title: Poultry Farm Respiratory Outbreak - Nairobi
animal_events.description: Chicken farm with 45 deaths and 120 affected birds (9% mortality rate)
animal_events.note: 2.1km from respiratory human cases - triggers zoonotic alert

animal_events.title: Turkey Farm Mixed Disease - Nairobi
animal_events.description: Turkey farm with 18 deaths and 55 affected birds (9% mortality) - unvaccinated
animal_events.note: Unvaccinated + high mortality + near ANIMAL_001 = compound risk

animal_events.title: Cattle Farm Gastrointestinal Issue - Kampala
animal_events.description: Dairy farm with 5 cattle deaths and 28 affected (3.3% mortality) - well vaccinated
animal_events.note: Vaccination helping; correlates with nearby human GI cases - foodborne investigation

animal_events.title: Pig Farm Respiratory Alert - Lagos
animal_events.description: Swine farm with 12 deaths and 45 affected pigs (4% mortality) - respiratory signs

environmental_samples.title: Contaminated Water Source - Nairobi Market
environmental_samples.description: Water from local market testing positive for H5N1 and Influenza A viruses

form_data.notes: Water source near poultry market showing high contamination

environmental_samples.note: Between HUMAN_001, ANIMAL_001, ANIMAL_002 - confirms transmission route

environmental_samples.title: Food Contamination - Kampala Market
environmental_samples.description: Market produce testing positive for Salmonella and E.coli O157:H7

form_data.notes: Vegetables from local market testing positive for pathogens

environmental_samples.note: Correlates with HUMAN_002 (foodborne GI case) and ANIMAL_003 (cattle GI)

environmental_samples.title: Poor Air Quality - Lagos Industrial Area
environmental_samples.description: Severe air pollution with PM10 levels 5.78x WHO limit causing respiratory concerns

form_data.notes: Severe air pollution from industrial emissions affecting nearby communities

environmental_samples.note: May exacerbate respiratory symptoms in affected population

environmental_samples.title: Soil Contamination - Lagos Agricultural Area
environmental_samples.description: Soil showing heavy metal contamination and mycobacterial/fungal pathogens

form_data.notes: Soil contamination affecting local crops and farmer health

environmental_samples.note: Impacts agricultural workers and crop safety

submission_scenarios.title: Zoonotic Disease Outbreak Detection
submission_scenarios.description: Multi-domain outbreak showing disease transmission from animals to humans via environmental route

sequence.action: Submit water sample positive for H5N1 (between locations)
Second case from same area escalates alert
sequence.expected_system_behavior: CRITICAL alert generated with zoonotic risk score 92/100

submission_scenarios.title: Foodborne Illness Cluster Investigation
submission_scenarios.description: Multiple domain indicators pointing to contaminated food as source

sequence.action: Food sample positive for Salmonella and E.coli
sequence.expected_system_behavior: HIGH alert with foodborne cluster notification

submission_scenarios.title: Environmental Health Hazard Alert
submission_scenarios.description: Environmental monitoring reveals air quality and soil contamination risks

sequence.action: Report poor air quality in Lagos

sequence.expected_system_behavior: MODERATE alert with environmental health advisory

human_cases.test_1: Submit EXAMPLE_HUMAN_001, verify High severity triggers alert
human_cases.test_2: Submit EXAMPLE_HUMAN_002 in Kampala, verify GI case recorded
human_cases.test_3: Submit EXAMPLE_HUMAN_003, verify Low severity (no alert)
human_cases.test_4: Submit EXAMPLE_HUMAN_004 near EXAMPLE_HUMAN_001, verify escalation

animal_events.test_1: Submit EXAMPLE_ANIMAL_001, verify high mortality calculated (9%)
animal_events.test_3: Submit EXAMPLE_ANIMAL_003 vaccinated, verify manageable assessment
animal_events.test_4: Check all 4 animals visible on map

environmental_samples.test_2: Submit EXAMPLE_ENV_002, verify food contamination recorded
environmental_samples.test_3: Submit EXAMPLE_ENV_003, verify air quality index shown
environmental_samples.test_4: Submit EXAMPLE_ENV_004, verify soil parameters stored

system_integration.test_1: Submit SCENARIO_001 sequence, verify zoonotic alert generation
system_integration.test_2: Submit SCENARIO_002 sequence, verify foodborne alert
system_integration.test_3: View Dashboard, verify all 12+ records appear
system_integration.test_4: View Map, verify 8 human cases and 4 alerts plotted
system_integration.test_6: Test form validation with incomplete data
